textByHashes.963f4dd30610706d2da2c8031e2b1a518b8c30eb: It's mine. You can't have it, we found it!
textByHashes.756addad6ca8ea7fb92de678a6d71d20507be6cf: Not dragonstones. I like dragonstones, that's why I came here. However, I found a valuable coin instead, it speaks to me... but you can't have it! It's precious to me!
textByHashes.387dd332543907cb138c4caae616436424a9a52a: What is it? Is it dragonstones? I like dragonstones!
textByHashes.c9588d2a0aa3ae1f55d077b89810355c4977a853: Five? Will it give us five?
textByHashes.12041c13dda15b202062efe2974e06a9bb07e66a: Well then we are not interested!
textByHashes.98eabe3d130e9e92fd2ddbea7cf0258d8cad032f: Yes! Yes! We'll trade it for the dragonstones.
textByHashes.b20b459d12e3b77bfbd7e2c0c146742640f6cab7: Thanks for helping me, I'm not sure what would have happened if I had continued to listen to the voices in my head.
textByHashes.77716942f097ef5a0e4090cc3c7c09e73693f122: I took that coin from the Stone Relief in the Crypt of the Moon and trapped my friend Eodan in a secret room behind the relief. Could you return the coin to the relief and set him free?
textByHashes.1603b6ceb95bc1793331968ec9da2f78b6a8dcdf: It appears that when I stole the coin, the creature possessed me.
textByHashes.36deebc96e9b4f74d132b1b2d5c12afff68b60b4: I'm glad I no longer have that coin. I'm not sure what would have happened if I had continued to listen to the voices in my head.
textByHashes.b21768da9f6be400d5628c7f8d617e3df0a2179a: For some reason the coin returned to me. Here, take it before it corrupts me again!
textByHashes.4cf912a388d65e919c9599ef504452b5032a1f3a: I'm glad I no longer have that coin. I'm not sure what would have happened if I had continued to listen the voices in my head.
